title: BetterSleep‎ ‎
description: A Simple Sleep Plugin That Makes Not The Whole Server Sleep To Skip A Night
body:
# Overview
Enhance your server’s night-skipping logic with BetterSleep—flexible, configurable, and packed with safety checks.

## Features
- **Configurable Threshold:** Define how many players must sleep to skip the night.  
- **Normal Bed Animation:** Full sleep animation is preserved before time advances.  
- **Safety Checks:**  
  • Night (12541–23458 ticks) or thunderstorm only  
  • Must be within 8 blocks of your bed  
  • No monsters within an 8×5×8 area  
- **Live Counter:** ActionBar displays “x/needed players sleeping”.  
- **Easy Reload:** `/sleep reload` applies config changes instantly.

## Configuration (config.yml)
players-needed: 1

## Permissions
- **bettersleep.admin** (Default: op): Grants access to `/sleep Players set <#>` and `/sleep reload`.

## Commands
- `/sleep Players set <number>` — Set the sleep threshold.  
- `/sleep reload` — Reload the configuration.

Both commands require operator status or explicit `bettersleep.admin`.

---

## Happy sleeping!
